findings.message: Import-graph resolver could not follow 816 import specifier(s) (bare specs, workspace mappings the resolver could not read, or unsupported syntax). Reachability is conservative. Severity raised because the PR claims a fix (". This PR fixes").

Source file sdk/packages/shared/src/services/telemetry-config.ts was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path. Severity raised because the PR claims a fix (". This PR fixes").

pr.title: Fix OTEL variable bundling
pr.body:
OTEL variables are replaced at build time using the string `process.env.VARNAME`. The current checks break it.

This PR fixes them.
pr.author: BarreiroT
